questions.question: A movie monster you would absolutely not want to be trapped in an elevator with
Something people do while singing in the shower

answers.text: Use the shampoo bottle as a microphone
Give a concert to an imaginary audience
Make a soap mohawk hair style
Forget the lyrics and make them up

questions.question: Name a famous superhero group from pop culture
Something that makes a movie theater experience completely unbearable
The ultimate comfort food to eat while binge-watching a TV show
A superpower that sounds great but would actually be super annoying in real life
Name an iconic video game franchise known worldwide
Something people do to pretend they are busy when they see an awkward acquaintance in public

answers.text: Stare intensely at their phone screen
Pretend to read a label in a store
Turn around and walk the other way
Fling their keys or look for something in a bag

questions.question: A fictional place from movies or books that everyone wishes they could visit
Something that always happens to characters in a horror movie when they are running away

answers.text: They trip and fall over absolutely nothing
The car keys drop or the engine won't start
They run upstairs instead of out the front door
They hide in a terrible spot like a closet

questions.question: A genre of music you probably wouldn't play at a high-energy party
An unwritten rule of using public transportation or elevators

answers.text: Don't make eye contact with strangers
Let people exit before you try to get on
Keep your music / videos on mute
Leave a one-seat gap if possible
Face the door, not the other people
